name: Crawfish Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Red pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with oil and cook until golden brown.
2. Add chopped onions and stir constantly until almost cooked.
3. Pour in 1 1/2 cups cold water and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add crawfish tails and fat; cook until crawfish turns pink.
5. Stir in about 2 cups of water, then bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and cover; cook on low heat for another 30 minutes or until rice is tender.
7. About five minutes before serving, fluff the jambalaya with a fork to prevent rice from falling apart.
